mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(c.name, '未分类') AS categoryName, SUM(p.stock) AS stock, COUNT(p.id) AS productCount FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.category_id, c.name ORDER BY stock DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, IFNULL(c.name, '未分类') AS categoryName, p.stock, p.unit FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.stock <= 10 ORDER BY p.stock ASC, p.id ASC
SELECT p.name AS productName, p.stock, IFNULL(c.name, '未分类') AS categoryName FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.stock DESC LIMIT 10
